Trusted Settlement & Insurance Infrastructure
The Compliance Wave

Three regulations.
One deadline.
No platform.

For the first time, MENA corporations face simultaneous carbon compliance obligations — the UAE's National Registry for Carbon Credits, the EU's Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism, and ICAO's CORSIA mandate for airlines. Yet there is no marketplace, no integrated purchasing infrastructure, and no compliance tooling built for this region. Companies are navigating a complex, opaque market with spreadsheets and phone calls.

CarbonBridge changes that.

UAE NRCC66 days

Mandatory carbon reporting for large UAE emitters. First compliance deadline for the National Registry of Carbon Credits.

Deadline: May 30, 2026
EU CBAM282 days

Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism. UAE aluminium, steel, cement, and fertiliser exporters to the EU must purchase equivalent carbon credits.

Deadline: January 1, 2027
CORSIA Phase 2Procurement starting now

Mandatory carbon offsetting for international aviation. Emirates, Etihad, and Qatar Airways face multi-million credit requirements annually.

Deadline: 2027–2035
The Platform

From discovery to retirement,
in one workflow.

CarbonBridge integrates seven capabilities that are typically fragmented across different providers, spreadsheets, and manual processes.

01

Discover

Browse verified credits across Verra, Gold Standard, and ACR. Filter by type, geography, vintage, price, and ICVCM quality rating.

02

Evaluate

Compare credits using independent quality ratings, co-benefit scores, permanence risk assessments, and real-time price benchmarks.

03

Purchase & Insure

Buy with integrated insurance at checkout — non-delivery cover, invalidation protection, and CORSIA guarantees backed by Lloyd's.

04

Retire & Report

Retire credits across any registry from one dashboard. Auto-generated retirement certificates and audit-ready compliance records.

Core

Marketplace

Connect developers and buyers across multiple registries. Self-serve listings, RFQ system, and OTC facilitation.

Unique

Integrated Insurance

Optional credit guarantee insurance at checkout. Non-delivery, invalidation, political risk, and CORSIA covers via Kita and CFC (Lloyd's syndicates).

Core

Data & Ratings

Independent credit quality ratings (AAA–C) against ICVCM CCP criteria. Price benchmarks, vintage analysis, and compliance eligibility mapping.

Developer

Retirement API

REST API for point-of-sale carbon offsetting. Real-time retirement, certificate generation, and webhook notifications. From $0.02/tonne.

Enterprise

Carbon Management

Track your emissions, manage compliance obligations, and optimise your portfolio with dynamic tools and real-time market data.

Premium

Managed Procurement

White-glove service for large compliance buyers. CORSIA credit sourcing, CBAM bundling, forward offtake structuring, and dedicated account management.

Solutions

Built for every participant
in the carbon market.

Corporate Buyers

Source high-integrity credits for NRCC, CBAM, and voluntary commitments. Quality ratings remove guesswork. Insurance removes risk.

  • Multi-registry marketplace browsing
  • Independent quality ratings (AAA–C)
  • Insurance at checkout (Lloyd's-backed)
  • Portfolio management & compliance tracking
  • Retirement certificates on demand

Project Developers

List your credits on the region's first dedicated marketplace. Reach corporate buyers you can't access through bilateral channels alone.

  • Self-serve listing portal with inventory management
  • Reach Gulf corporate buyers directly
  • OTC and marketplace sales channels
  • Institutional settlement via ACX, CIX, Carbonplace
  • Forward contract facilitation

Airlines & Aviation

Procure CORSIA-eligible credits with Letters of Authorisation and corresponding adjustments. Full compliance packaging from sourcing to retirement.

  • CORSIA-eligible credit sourcing
  • Letter of Authorisation procurement
  • Insurance-wrapped delivery guarantees
  • Multi-year forward offtake structuring
  • Dedicated procurement desk

Developers & Platforms

Embed carbon offsetting into checkout flows, fintech apps, and corporate platforms. REST API with real-time retirement and certificate generation.

  • Point-of-sale retirement API
  • Webhook notifications & SDKs
  • White-label certificate generation
  • Sandbox environment for testing
  • Usage-based pricing from $0.02/tonne
Market Intelligence

Data you can
actually trust.

Every credit on CarbonBridge is independently rated against ICVCM Core Carbon Principles. No guesswork. No greenwashing.

Quality Ratings

AAA to C scale based on ICVCM CCP assessment — additionality, permanence, leakage risk, co-benefit scoring, and methodology integrity.

Price Intelligence

Real-time benchmarks by credit type, geography, vintage, and quality tier. Historical trends, forward curves, and spread analysis.

Compliance Mapping

Instant eligibility checks: which credits qualify for NRCC, CBAM, CORSIA, SBTi BVCM, and VCMI claims — before you buy.

Risk Scores

Permanence risk, political risk, and reversal probability scores for every project. Know what you're buying.

Browse all credits
Integrated Insurance

Every credit purchase,
protected.

Optional insurance at checkout — the only carbon marketplace with integrated credit guarantee products backed by Lloyd's of London.

Non-Delivery

Full refund if credits are not delivered as specified in the purchase agreement.

Invalidation

Protection if a registry invalidates credits post-issuance due to methodology or verification failures.

Political Risk

Coverage for sovereign intervention, export restrictions, or regulatory changes in the project host country.

CORSIA Guarantee

Insurance that credits maintain CORSIA eligibility through the entire compliance period.

Insurance & Underwriting Partners

Insurance distributed by CarbonBridge. Underwritten by Lloyd's of London syndicates.

About

Built by operators,
not observers.

CarbonBridge was founded by a team with deep experience across carbon markets, institutional finance, and technology — headquartered in the UAE with operations in Australia.

ADGM-registered entity
Verra General Account holder
ACX Abu Dhabi member
Institutional-grade settlement
Lloyd's insurance distribution
Multi-registry access
Our Position
“The first self-serve carbon credit marketplace with integrated insurance, data analytics, and compliance tools — built specifically for the MENA market.”

No existing platform combines marketplace, brokerage, insurance distribution, data ratings, API services, carbon management SaaS, and managed procurement in one product. We do.

FAQ

Common questions.

What registries do you support?

CarbonBridge supports credits from Verra (VCS), Gold Standard, and the American Carbon Registry (ACR). We also facilitate ACCU-adjacent projects registered directly with Verra.

How are credits rated?

We use an independent rating framework based on ICVCM Core Carbon Principles. Each credit is scored on additionality, permanence, leakage risk, co-benefits, and methodology integrity — from AAA (highest) to C.

Is the insurance mandatory?

No. Insurance is optional and available at checkout. You choose the level of cover you need — from basic non-delivery protection to comprehensive CORSIA guarantees.

How does settlement work?

Transactions under $100K settle via Stripe Connect escrow. Institutional transactions ($100K+) settle through ACX Abu Dhabi, CIX Singapore, or Carbonplace — bank-grade delivery-versus-payment.

Do you sell your own credits?

Yes, through CarbonBridge Direct — our own curated inventory. These are always clearly labelled and never algorithmically favoured over third-party listings.

What compliance frameworks do you support?

We map every credit to its eligibility for UAE NRCC, EU CBAM, ICAO CORSIA, SBTi BVCM, and VCMI claims. This mapping is visible before purchase.

Ready to navigate the
carbon market with confidence?

Whether you're purchasing your first credit or managing a multi-million dollar compliance programme — our team is here to help.
